qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Emam Ashour (Egypt) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, Egypt. Mostafa Zico is caught offside.
Attempt blocked. Leandro Trossard (Belgium) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Kevin De Bruyne.

events.description: 特罗萨德射门被封堵。 德布劳内参与进攻。
